characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair with dark roots.
characters.wardrobe: Yellow hoodie and white wireless earbuds.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female avatar, fair complexion, wavy orange hair, large green eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Yellow sweater and gold hoop earrings.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: क्या तुम इंग्लिश बोल सकती हो? [Can you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I know English.
Character B says: Native speakers ऐसे बोलते हैं: "I speak English" [Native speakers speak like this: "I speak English"]
Character A says: I speak English.
Character B says: तुम्हारी उम्र क्या है? [How old are you?]
Character A says: My age is 23.
Character B says: हम्म... इसे ऐसे बोलो: "I'm 23" [Hmm... say it like this: "I'm 23"]
Character A says: I'm 23!
Character B says: तुम्हारा नाम क्या है? [What is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Priya.
Character B says: Fluent इंग्लिश में हम कहते हैं: I'm Priya. [In fluent English, we say: I'm Priya.]
Character A says: I'm Priya.
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया! [Very good!]
Character A says: Thank you, but who are you?
Character B says: मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ! तुम मेरे साथ रोज़ ऐसे ही इंग्लिश practice कर सकती हो। [I am Supernova's AI tutor! You can practice English with me like this every day.]
Character A says: Ah, but.. मेरी इंग्लिश बहुत weak है। I cannot speak. [Ah, but.. my English is very weak. I cannot speak.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, मैं तुम्हें हिंदी में समझा कर सिखाऊंगी। [No problem, I will explain and teach you in Hindi.]
Character A says: You know Hindi?
Character B says: हाँ बिलकुल, आख़िर मैं एक AI हूँ! [Yes of course, after all I am an AI!]
Character A says: Okay, I'll download this app.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by immediately demonstrating the core product value: real-time, interactive conversation correction.
- Establishes a warm, non-judgmental tone where mistakes are gently corrected to sound more natural.
- Addresses a key friction point (fear of being a beginner) by revealing the AI can teach comfortably in the user's native language (Hindi).
- Ends with a clear, logical progression to the user wanting to download the app.

- Provides a clear, uncluttered final call-to-action.
- Reinforces brand identity with the logo.
- Directs users to the appropriate app stores for download.
